DISCOVERY 302,PLAINTIFF RAYYAN MAJID'S MOTION TO COMPEL NOTICED SITE INSPECTION: THE MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF REAL PROPERTY AND TO PERMIT THE INSPECTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1438 VAN DYKE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA BY NO LATER THAN JULY 21, 2022, WITH PROVISION OF ADEQUATE NOTICE TO ANY TENANTS AS APPROPRIATE. CIV. CODE SECTION 1954(A)(4), CODE CIV. PROC. SECTIONS 2017.010, 2031.010(D). PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE AT PVESTAL@NVLAWLLP.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VESTAL, CLERK: A. DATT, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-03-2023 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-21-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Noticed Site Inspection
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RAYYAN MAJID's Motion To Compel Noticed Site Inspection:

The motion is GRANTED. Defendants are ordered to comply with Plaintiff's Demand for Inspection of Real Property and to permit the inspection of the premises located at 1438 Van Dyke Avenue, San Francisco, California by no later than July 21, 2022, with provision of adequate notice to any tenants as appropriate. Civ. Code section 1954(a)(4), Code Civ. Proc. sections 2017.010, 2031.010(d).

Plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order in Word format to the pro tem judge at pvestal@nvlawllp.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal, Clerk: A. Datt, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
